name: AI_SOC_IDS
author: SOC-AI-Analyst
description: ML-based BENIGN/ATTACK classification for a TheHive case, using local CICIDS2017-trained models only. Heuristic feature extraction from case metadata unless real flow data is present — see README for the confidence caveat.

configurationItems.name: thehive_url
configurationItems.description: Base URL of the TheHive instance, e.g. http://thehive:9000

configurationItems.name: thehive_apikey
configurationItems.description: TheHive API key used to fetch case details

configurationItems.name: models_path
configurationItems.description: Directory containing random_forest_ids.pkl, scaler.pkl, label_encoder.pkl, feature_names.pkl (copied from the main AI-SOC project's models/ directory)
